note: The explicit calculation directly shows x+tD in V^+ (not F). The stronger conclusion x+tD in F follows from the abstract principle in the first sentence (x is in the algebraic relative interior of F), which is a standard fact about faces of cones provable without closedness or finite-dimensionality. The presentation could be clearer about this logical structure: the explicit calculation demonstrates the V^+ membership ingredient, while the F membership relies on the abstract face theory. Mathematically sound.
